name: workflow_logs
description: Fetches logs for a specific job in an EAS workflow run. Call without sectionIndex or phase to get a summary of log sections (phase names and line ranges); then call again with sectionIndex or phase to fetch that section.

workflowRunId.description: The ID of the workflow run

jobKey.description: The key or ID of the job to fetch logs for. Use workflow_info to see available job keys.

sectionIndex.description: 1-based index of a log section to fetch (from the summary). Omit to get a summary of sections first.

phase.description: Phase name to fetch (e.g. RUN_GRADLEW, SPIN_UP_BUILDER). Omit to get a summary of sections first.
